combos.name: BFS + Hash Map
combos.storyHook: Transform 'CAT' into 'DOG' by changing one letter at a time — every intermediate word must be real! BFS finds the SHORTEST transformation path. The Hash Map tracks which words we've already visited (so we don't go in circles). Together they're unbeatable!
combos.recognitionCue: Shortest path where each state is a string/word → BFS for levels + HashMap for O(1) visited check. Classic: Word Ladder, Minimum Genetic Mutation.

combos.name: Heap + Sorting
combos.storyHook: The king wants to find the K closest treasure spots to his castle! Sort by distance? Too slow for streaming data. Instead, use a Max-Heap of size K — whenever a closer point appears, pop the farthest and push the new one. In the end, the heap holds exactly the K closest!
combos.recognitionCue: Top-K closest/farthest/most-frequent → Keep a Heap of size K. For static arrays, Heap+Sort. For streams, just the Heap. Classic: K Closest Points, Top K Frequent.

combos.name: DFS + Backtracking
combos.storyTheme: Path Sum II — All Treasure Trails
combos.storyHook: A treasure hunter wants to find ALL root-to-leaf paths in a magical forest where the path sum equals a target number. She uses DFS to explore deep into the forest, and Backtracking to undo her steps when a path doesn't work — trying every single trail without missing one!
combos.recognitionCue: Find ALL valid paths/solutions in a tree/graph → DFS (go deep) + Backtracking (undo and try next). Classic: Path Sum II, Word Search, Palindrome Partitioning.
